title: The Indian Tolls Act, 1851
full_text: The Indian Tolls Act, 1851 भारतीय पथकर अधिनियम,1851 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 185108 Act Number: 08 Enactment Date: 1851-06-04 Act Year: 1851 Short Title: The Indian Tolls Act, 1851 Hindi Title: भारतीय पथकर अधिनियम,1851 Long Title: An Act for enabling Government to levy Tolls on Public Roads and Bridges. Ministry: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways Enforcement Date: 04-06-1851 Last Updated: 25-03-2019 Schedule 1. SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Indian Tolls Act, 1851 Show all section Section 1. [Repealed.]. Section 1A. Extent. Section 2. Power to cause levy of tolls on roads and bridges within certain rates, and to appoint collectors. Section 3. Their powers for recovery of toll. Section 4. Exemptions from payment of toll. Section 5. Assistance of collectors by Police-officers. Section 6. Penalty for offences under Act. Compensation to person aggrieved. Saving of his right to sue. Section 7. Exhibition of table of tolls, and statement of penalties. Section 8. Application of proceeds of tolls. Schedule 1. SCHEDULE.
